violations.text: Various food was observed held at between 42-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in cooler and prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ambient of prep unit was observed fluctuating between 44-47 DF. All food in unit, other than turkey, was moved to properly functioning refrigeration at the time of inspection. Turkey was observed at 47 DF and voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Cheese, chicken, and dressings were observed between 43-45 DF in the walk-in cooler. Walk-in cooler thermostat was turned down and observed holding an ambient temperature of 37 DF at the time of inspection. Establishment is to monitor the internal food temperature of the food in walk-in cooler. Per PIC, service will be called. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Meats in prep unit were observed being stored in plastic shopping bags. Various food in the chest freezer was observed uncovered. Food must be covered to prevent contamination. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
Drinks and spices were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Inspector observed meats in chest freezer being stored in shopping bags. PIC informed. Inspector observed several foods, located in reach-in freezer, uncovered and unprotected from contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

Tongs were stored on an unclean surface (Ansul system) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The following door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. 1. Chest freezer 2. Ice cream freezer Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
